name: Lemony Chicken and Anchovy Ravioli
recipeIngredient: 1 Quantity plain pasta dough (2 cups flour, 3 eggs)
60 grams Fresh parmesan cheese, thinly sliced (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a pan and add the minced chicken. Cook, stirring for 2 minutes.
2. Stir in the chopped anchovies, grated Parmesan cheese, cream, ground nutmeg, lemon rind, lemon juice, and chopped parsley. Blend or process the mixture until smooth.
3. Divide the pasta dough into two equal pieces. Roll each piece out until it is about 2 mm thick.
4. Place a small amount of filling (about 1/4 teaspoon) 3 cm apart on one sheet of pasta. Lightly brush the remaining pasta sheet with water, place it over the filling, and press firmly around the edges.
5. Cut into square ravioli shapes. Lightly sprinkle the ravioli with a little flour.
6. Just before serving, add the ravioli to a large pan of boiling water and boil, uncovered, for about 5 minutes or until just tender. Drain the ravioli.
7. Combine the cooked ravioli with the creamy cheese sauce and serve topped with extra grated Parmesan cheese.
Creamy Cheese Sauce:
1. Melt butter in a pan and add flour. Stir over heat until bubbling.
2. Remove from heat, gradually stir in water and crumbled chicken stock cube, stirring over heat until the mixture boils and thickens.
3. Simmer, uncovered, until reduced by half.
4. Just before serving, stir in cream and grated Parmesan cheese.
